title_en: A Survey: Learning Embodied Intelligence from Physical Simulators and World Models
title_zh: 综述：从物理模拟器与世界模型中学习具身智能
abstract_en: This survey reviews how physical simulators and world models jointly support embodied intelligence, robot learning, and sim-to-real transfer.
abstract_zh: 这篇综述回顾了物理模拟器与世界模型如何共同支撑具身智能、机器人学习以及 sim-to-real 迁移。
editorial_summary_zh: 适合作为具身世界模型的总览入口，覆盖模拟器、内部模型和真实部署之间的关系。
editorial_summary_en: A strong overview of how simulators and internal world models combine in embodied AI.
why_it_matters: It helps readers understand the broader stack around embodied world models, not just individual robot demos.
